channel.title: Publishing on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Publishing on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Resurrecting The Arcanum IP
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about resurrecting the Arcanum intellectual property.

item.title: Planning For A Sequel
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about planning for a sequel.

item.title: Game Rights
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about game rights, Specifically, who owns the rights to games that you’re playing and how the individuals who worked on those games, what they own and what they don’t own.

item.title: Adapting TTRPGs vs. Other IPs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about adapting tabletop role playing games into video games versus adapting a non-game IP into a video game.

item.title: Working In Another's Game IP
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about working in another’s game IP.

item.title: Using An IP In A Different Medium
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about using an IP in a different medium, and

item.title: Converting A Movie Into A Game
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about converting, like a movie or TV show into a game.

item.title: Romantasy
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Romany, which is a new term that I learned and I will get into defining in a second.

item.title: Contractor Contracts
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about contractor contracts.

item.title: Publisher Contracts
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about contracts, specifically the contracts you make with Publishers to make games.

item.title: Prequels
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about prequels now I did a video on sequels and it’s linked below.

item.title: An Example Of Making A New IP
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about making an IP an actual example.

item.title: Troika And Kickstarter: What If?
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about troa games and Kickstarter.

item.title: Sequels
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today let’s talk about sequels.

item.title: Piracy
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about piracy.

item.title: Game Pitches
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today let’s talk about game pitches.

item.title: Making And Maintaining An IP
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about making and maintaining an IP.

item.title: Troika's Might & Magic 10 Design
item.description: Hi. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about troika’s proposal from might Magic 10..
